allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/games" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content-Encoding: $\($r.Headers['Content-Encoding']\)"; Write-Output "Cache-Control: $\($r.Headers['Cache-Control']\)"; Write-Output "Body length: $\($r.Content.Length\) chars"; $hasCards = $r.Content -match 'game-card'; Write-Output "Has pre-rendered cards: $hasCards")

PowerShell($headers = @{ 'Accept-Encoding' = 'gzip, deflate' }; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/games" -Headers $headers -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content-Encoding: $\($r.Headers['Content-Encoding']\)"; Write-Output "Cache-Control: $\($r.Headers['Cache-Control']\)"; Write-Output "Content-Length: $\($r.Headers['Content-Length']\)"; Write-Output "Body length: $\($r.RawContentLength\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/games" -UseBasicParsing; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $first = $data[0]; Write-Output "Fields: $\($first.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)"; Write-Output "Has description: $\($first.PSObject.Properties['description'] -ne $null\)")
